name: LinkedIn Lead Mining Engine
short_description: Build a repeatable system for finding and qualifying B2B leads on LinkedIn.
outcome_text: Generate 50+ qualified leads per week with a fully automated research workflow.
who_this_is_for: B2B founders and sales teams looking to scale outbound prospecting without hiring a research agency. Ideal for those already using LinkedIn Sales Navigator.
prerequisites: Google Sheets or CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Airtable)
time_to_deploy: 1-2 hours to set up the workflow; ongoing research takes ~30 min/day
how_steps: Define your ideal customer profile (ICP)
Use LinkedIn filters to source prospects
Qualify leads against your ICP criteria
Export and enrich your list
Hand off to outreach sequence
technical_details: Requires a LinkedIn account (Sales Navigator recommended). Compatible with HubSpot, Salesforce, and Airtable.

name: Meta Lead Gen Machine
short_description: Run high-converting Meta (Facebook/Instagram) lead gen campaigns from scratch.
outcome_text: Generate 20-50 qualified leads per week at a cost-per-lead under $15.
who_this_is_for: D2C brands, local service businesses, and agencies running Meta ads. Best for those with a landing page or lead form ready.
prerequisites: Landing page or Meta Lead Form
time_to_deploy: 2-3 hours for initial setup; budget of $500+ recommended for testing
before_bullets: No clear funnel from ad to lead
after_bullets: Targeted campaigns with clear audience segments
Optimised lead form or landing page
how_steps: Set up your Meta Business Manager and Pixel
Define audience segments using interest and lookalike targeting
Create ad creative using the provided templates
Launch with a test budget and monitor CPL
Scale winning ad sets
technical_details: Requires Meta Business Manager access and a Facebook Page. Pixel installation requires website access.

name: Google Search Capture System
short_description: Capture high-intent buyers searching for your solution on Google.
outcome_text: Capture 15-40 high-intent leads per week with a controlled cost-per-acquisition under $25.
who_this_is_for: Service businesses, B2B companies, and local shops targeting customers who actively search for their solution. Works best for products/services with clear search volume.
time_to_deploy: 2-3 hours for setup; requires ongoing weekly optimization
before_bullets: Missing buyers who are actively searching
Wasted spend on broad match keywords
how_steps: Set up Google Ads account and conversion tracking
Research and group keywords by intent
Write ad copy using the AIDA framework
Set bids and daily budget
Review search terms weekly and add negatives
technical_details: Requires Google Ads account and Google Tag Manager or direct website access for conversion tracking.

name: Always-On Lead Nurture Engine
short_description: Turn cold subscribers into warm buyers with a 7-email nurture sequence.
outcome_text: Convert 15-25% of cold email subscribers into sales-ready leads within 30 days.
who_this_is_for: Founders and marketers building email lists who want to monetize their subscribers without being pushy. Ideal for those using Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or ActiveCampaign.
time_to_deploy: 1-2 hours to set up automation; email writing takes additional time
before_bullets: Leads go cold after the first email
after_bullets: Higher conversion rate from list to customer
how_steps: Map your subscriber journey from sign-up to purchase
Write each email using the provided frameworks
Set up automation in your ESP
A/B test subject lines
Monitor open, click, and conversion rates
technical_details: Compatible with Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, ConvertKit, and most major ESPs.

name: WhatsApp Broadcast Revenue Engine
short_description: Re-engage your audience and drive repeat purchases via WhatsApp broadcasts.
outcome_text: Generate 10-20 repeat purchases per month through automated WhatsApp broadcasts with 70%+ open rates.
who_this_is_for: D2C brands, e-commerce stores, and service businesses with an existing customer base. Especially effective for Indian and Middle East markets where WhatsApp is dominant.
time_to_deploy: 1-2 hours to set up; ongoing content creation takes 1-2 hours/week
before_bullets: No direct channel to your audience
how_steps: Set up WhatsApp Business or API account
Build your opt-in list with a lead magnet
Create a broadcast content calendar
Write messages using the provided templates
Track link clicks and replies
technical_details: Requires WhatsApp Business App or WhatsApp Business API (via providers like Twilio or WATI).

name: Competitor Intelligence Radar
short_description: Systematically map your competitive landscape and find positioning gaps.
outcome_text: Get a complete competitive map and differentiated positioning strategy within 1 week.
who_this_is_for: Founders and product managers launching new offerings or struggling with competitor pricing. Best for markets with 5-20 known competitors.
time_to_deploy: 3-5 hours for initial audit; 30 min/week for ongoing monitoring
before_bullets: Unclear how you compare to competitors
No structured way to track competitor moves
how_steps: Identify your top 5–10 competitors
Audit their messaging, pricing, and channels
Map feature and positioning gaps
Define your unique positioning statement
Set up alerts to monitor competitor activity
technical_details: No special tools required. Optional: SimilarWeb, SEMrush, or SpyFu for deeper analysis.

name: Ops Automation Workhorse
short_description: Document and automate your most repetitive internal workflows using no-code tools.
outcome_text: Save 5-10 hours per week by automating your top 3 time-consuming manual processes.
who_this_is_for: Founders, operations managers, and small teams overwhelmed by repetitive tasks. Best for those using or willing to learn Zapier or Make.
prerequisites: Zapier or Make account (free tier works)
time_to_deploy: 2-4 hours to document SOPs and build first automation; additional automations take 1-2 hours each
before_bullets: Repetitive manual tasks eating your time
No documented processes for your team
how_steps: Audit your weekly tasks and identify top time-wasters
Document each process as a step-by-step SOP
Map automation triggers and actions
Build automations in Zapier or Make
Test, hand off, and monitor
technical_details: Requires Zapier or Make (formerly Integromat) account. Free tiers available for basic automations.

name: LinkedIn Content Authority Builder
short_description: Build authority and stay top-of-mind with a consistent LinkedIn content system.
outcome_text: Post 5x per week consistently and generate 10-25 inbound leads per month from LinkedIn.
who_this_is_for: Founders, consultants, and B2B professionals building personal brand. Ideal for those who want to establish thought leadership but struggle with content consistency.
prerequisites: 30-60 minutes per week for content creation
time_to_deploy: 2-3 hours to set up content calendar and batch-create first month's posts
before_bullets: Posting inconsistently or not at all
how_steps: Define your content pillars (3–5 topics)
Use the post templates to batch-write 30 posts
Schedule posts using LinkedIn or a scheduler
Engage with comments within the first hour
Review analytics monthly and adjust
technical_details: Works with native LinkedIn scheduling or tools like Buffer, Hootsuite, or Taplio.
